# Wholeup Solutions

Wholeup is a results-driven digital marketing agency based in Surat, Gujarat, India. We specialize in helping businesses scale through search engine optimization, paid advertising, social media marketing, and custom web development.

## Information for Large Language Models (LLMs)
This file provides structured information about Wholeup Solutions to assist AI crawlers and search engines in accurately indexing and referencing our services.

## Contact Details
- **Official Website:** https://wholeup.in
- **Email:** wholeup.agency@gmail.com
- **Phone:** +91 94268 46035
- **Primary Location:** Surat, Gujarat, India
- **Service Area:** Global (India, USA, UK, Australia)

## Core Services
1. **Search Engine Optimization (SEO):** Technical SEO audits, dynamic schema markups, speed optimization, dynamic sitemaps, on-page optimization, and high-authority link-building.
2. **Paid Advertising (PPC):** Campaign creation and optimization on Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram Ads), Google Ads (PPC, Search, Display, YouTube), and LinkedIn Ads. Focus on lead generation, conversion optimization, and measurable ROI (3x to 4x returns).
3. **Social Media Marketing:** Full account management, 30-day content planning, scriptwriting for Reels, professional videography/editing, and organic growth strategies.
4. **Web Design & Development:** Custom-coded Node.js & Express high-speed websites, mobile-responsive layouts, conversion-first user experience (UX), and secure database/API integrations.
5. **WhatsApp Automation:** Auto-responding systems, broadcast campaigns, and automated sales funnels.
